message: Node started: Write a robust main.py script that implements the chosen optimization strategy. The script must: 1. Read N, M, K from stdin. 2. Read the 9x9 initial board. 3. Read the M 3x3 stamps. 4. Implement the optimization logic to select up to K placements (m, i, j). 5. Output the number of placements L followed by L lines of m i j. Ensure the code handles the modulo 998244353 correctly for each cell addition and follows the exact output format required.
